title: erythroxylum annamense
intro: Erythroxylum annamense is a species of plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the coca family, which is native to Southeast Asia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Erythroxylum annamense include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Erythroxylum annamense can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
